title: GAN-DRL Cyber Deception for Resilient Smart-Grid Network Defense
description: Reproducible implementation of a self-adaptive cyber deception framework for resilient smart-grid network defense. The repository includes synthetic smart-grid SCADA-IP traffic generation, GAN-based adversarial attack sample synthesis, DQN-based adaptive deception policy learning, Digital Immune Mechanism-based self-healing, baseline comparison, ablation analysis, statistical evaluation, and reproducible figure generation.

creators.name: Ramaraj, Rajeshwari
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Panimalar Engineering College, Chennai, India

creators.name: Govindasamy, Umarani
creators.affiliation: Department of Computer Science and Engineering, Panimalar Engineering College, Chennai, India

notes: This archived software package supports reproducibility of the experimental pipeline described in the associated manuscript. The primary dataset is generated synthetically by the repository scripts. Public datasets CICIDS2017 and UNSW-NB15 are referenced only for benchmark alignment and are not redistributed with this archive.
